mapper.select: /* skylifeMapper.getRegMemberList */ SELECT JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS CI , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MBL_TEL_NO , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DH , JSH.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS SVC_OPEN_DH , JSH.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS CHG_DH , '101' AS CHG_KIND_CD , '' AS RSCS_DH , JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AS SCRBR_NO , '' AS NS_CONTRACT_NUM , DTL.LST_RATE_CD AS PRDT_CD , DTL.LST_RATE_NM AS PRDT_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO JCI , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST JSH WHERE JSI.CUSTOMER_ID = JCI.CUSTOMER_ID AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = JSH.CONTRACT_NUM AND JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND JSH.EVNT_CD = 'NAC' AND JSI.OPEN_AGNT_CD = 'V000015495' AND TO_DATE(JSI.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-2) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/60/60/24

/* skylifeMapper.getChgMemberList */ SELECT RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY SCRBR_NO ORDER BY CHG_DH DESC) AS SEQ , CI , MBL_TEL_NO , CUST_NM , BIRTH_DH , SVC_OPEN_DH , CHG_DH , CHG_KIND_CD , RSCS_DH , SCRBR_NO , PRDT_CD , PRDT_NM FROM ( SELECT JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS CI , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MBL_TEL_NO , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DH , PSM.SVC_OPEN_DT AS SVC_OPEN_DH , JSH.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS CHG_DH , DECODE(JSH.EVNT_CD,'SUS','102','RSP','103','CAN','106','MCN','121','CCN','122','RCL','129') AS CHG_KIND_CD , DECODE(JSH.EVNT_CD,'CAN',JSH.EVNT_TRTM_DT,'') AS RSCS_DH , JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AS SCRBR_NO , DTL.LST_RATE_CD AS PRDT_CD , DTL.LST_RATE_NM AS PRDT_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO JCI , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST JSH , MSP_PARTNER_SKYLIFE_MST PSM WHERE JSI.CUSTOMER_ID = JCI.CUSTOMER_ID AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = PSM.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = JSH.CONTRACT_NUM AND JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND JSH.EVNT_CD IN ('MCN', 'SUS', 'RSP', 'CAN', 'RCL', 'CCN') AND TO_DATE(JSH.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/60/60/24 UNION ALL SELECT JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI AS CI , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MBL_TEL_NO , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('1', '2', '5', '6') THEN '19' WHEN SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 7, 1) IN ('3', '4', '7', '8') THEN '20' ELSE '18' END || SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(JSI.USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH_DH , PSM.SVC_OPEN_DT AS SVC_OPEN_DH , JFI.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS CHG_DH , '301' AS CHG_KIND_CD , '' AS RSCS_DH , JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AS SCRBR_NO , JFI.SOC AS PRDT_CD , (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = JFI.SOC) AS PRDT_NM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO JCI , MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO JFI , MSP_PARTNER_SKYLIFE_MST PSM WHERE JSI.CUSTOMER_ID = JCI.CUSTOMER_ID AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = PSM.CONTRACT_NUM AND JSI.CONTRACT_NUM = JFI.CONTRACT_NUM AND JCI.SELF_CSTMR_CI IS NOT NULL AND JFI.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND JFI.EVNT_CD = 'SCH' AND TO_DATE(JFI.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1/60/60/24 ) ORDER BY CHG_DH ASC

/* skylifeMapper.getSendMemberList */ SELECT SIH.CI AS CI , JSI.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MBL_TEL_NO , JSI.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , SIH.BIRTH_DT AS BIRTH_DH , SIH.SVC_OPEN_DT AS SVC_OPEN_DH , SIH.CHG_DT AS CHG_DH , SIH.CHG_KIND_CD AS CHG_KIND_CD , SIH.RSCS_DT AS RSCS_DH , SIH.CONTRACT_NUM AS SCRBR_NO , SIH.RATE_CD AS PRDT_CD , SIH.RATE_NM AS PRDT_NM , 'M mobile' AS AGNCY_NM FROM MSP_PARTNER_SKYLIFE_IF_HST SIH, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO JSI WHERE SIH.CONTRACT_NUM = JSI.CONTRACT_NUM AND SIH.SEND_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
